name: autonomous-engineer
description: Autonomous engineering team for Claude Code. A main-loop Orchestrator coordinates 5 specialist subagents (Intake Analyst, Software Engineer, QA Engineer, lens-parameterized Reviewer, Engineering Manager), 11 slash commands (/ticket, /bug, /feature, /review, /qa, /pr, /status, /resume, /setup, /log, /selfcheck), and 11 skills covering orchestration, the six workflow patterns, tier-aware bug & feature pipelines, ticket and PR protocols, multi-tenant validation, MCP setup, run logging, and progress reporting. Routes every ticket to a risk tier (T0/T1/T2) so depth matches risk, and ships a golden-ticket eval (/selfcheck) so changes are measurable. Takes a ticket from intake to Pull Request.
